title: Lakhmi Varaha Temple
tagline: Lakhmi Varaha Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Sri Sri Lakshmi Varaha Swamy Temple (Odia: ଶ୍ରୀ ଶ୍ରୀ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ମୀବରାହ ସ୍ବାମୀ ମନ୍ଦିର) is a 500-year-old Indian temple dedicated to Varaha, the boar incarnation of Vishnu.
overview.description: Sri Sri Lakshmi Varaha Swamy Temple (Odia: ଶ୍ରୀ ଶ୍ରୀ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ମୀବରାହ ସ୍ବାମୀ ମନ୍ଦିର) is a 500-year-old Indian temple dedicated to Varaha, the boar incarnation of Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Aul, Odisha
topPlaces.description: Aul is a town and the headquarters of Aul CD Block and Aul Tehsil in Kendrapara district in the Indian state of Odisha. It is 17 km from Chandabali.

topPlaces.name: Routa
topPlaces.description: Routa is a village in Kendrapara district, Odisha state, India.

topPlaces.name: Namatara
topPlaces.description: Namatara is an Indian village situated in the Kendrapara district of Odisha. It is located on the bank of Kharosrota river, 150 km away from Bhubaneswar, the capital of Odisha.

topPlaces.name: Jenavali
topPlaces.description: Jenavali is a village in Odisha, India. It is located in the Aali tehsil and Aul block of Kendrapara District.

topPlaces.name: Rajkanika
topPlaces.description: Rajkanika is a town and block of Kendrapara district in the Indian state of Odisha.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Lakhmi Varaha Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Lakhmi Varaha Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Lakhmi Varaha Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (99 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (97 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Lakhmi Varaha Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Lakhmi Varaha Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Lakhmi Varaha Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Lakhmi Varaha Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Lakhmi Varaha Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Aul, Odisha, Routa, Namatara, Jenavali, Rajkanika.
